sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Clock, BookOpen, Users, Star, Play, Award, Target, User, Building } from 'lucide-react'; const ScenarioDetail: React.FC = () => { // In a real implementation, this would fetch from backend // For now, we'll use mock data for the first scenario const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>(); // Mock data for the first scenario const scenario = { _id: '1', title: 'The Inventory That Changed Everything', description: 'A complex civil litigation case involving inventory discrepancies, contract disputes, and corporate fraud allegations. This scenario challenges participants to navigate through evidence analysis, witness examination, and legal argumentation in a high-stakes corporate environment.', practiceArea: 'Civil Law', difficulty: 'Intermediate', estimatedTime: 45, rating: 4.5, reviewCount: 24, price: 0, // Free scenario tags: ['contract law', 'evidence analysis', 'civil litigation', 'corporate fraud'], status: 'published', createdAt: '2025-01-15T10:30:00Z', updatedAt: '2025-01-20T14:45:00Z', creator: { username: 'LegalExpert2025' }, learningObjectives: [ 'Analyze complex contractual disputes and identify key legal issues', 'Evaluate inventory management evidence and forensic accounting reports', 'Develop effective cross-examination strategies for expert witnesses', 'Apply civil procedure rules in pre-trial motions and discovery', 'Construct persuasive legal arguments for both plaintiff and defendant' ], courtType: 'District Court', parties: [ { role: 'Plaintiff', name: 'Meridian Technologies Ltd.', description: 'A mid-sized technology company specializing in software solutions' }, { role: 'Defendant', name: 'Global Supply Corp.', description: 'A multinational logistics and supply chain management corporation' }, { role: 'Witness', name: 'Sarah Johnson', description: 'Inventory Manager at Meridian Technologies with 8 years of experience' }, { role: 'Expert', name: 'Dr. Michael Chen', description: 'Forensic Accountant and Certified Fraud Examiner with 15 years of experience' } ] }; const getDifficultyColor = (difficulty: string) => { switch (difficulty) { case 'Beginner': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200'; case 'Intermediate': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200'; case 'Advanced': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border-yellow-200'; case 'Expert': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800 border-red-200'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 border-gray-200'; } }; const getDifficultyIcon = (difficulty: string) => { switch (difficulty) { case 'Beginner': return '🌱'; case 'Intermediate': return '📊'; case 'Advanced': return '🔥'; case 'Expert': return '👑'; default: return '📚'; } }; return (
Back to All Scenarios
{/* Hero Section */}
Featured Scenario

{scenario.title}

{scenario.rating}
{[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
{scenario.reviewCount} reviews

{scenario.description}

{scenario.tags.map((tag, index) => ( {tag} ))}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Key Details */}

Scenario Overview

Practice Area
{scenario.practiceArea}
Time Required
{scenario.estimatedTime} min
Court Type
{scenario.courtType}
{getDifficultyIcon(scenario.difficulty)}
Difficulty
{scenario.difficulty}
{/* Learning Objectives */}

Learning Objectives

{scenario.learningObjectives.map((objective, index) => (
{index + 1}
{objective}
))}
{/* Parties Involved */}

Parties Involved

{scenario.parties.map((party, index) => (
{party.name}
{party.role}

{party.description}

))}
{/* Sidebar */}
{/* Creator Info */}

Created By

{scenario.creator.username}
Legal Expert
{/* Coming Soon Card */}

Scenario Coming Soon

This scenario is currently under development. Check back soon to experience this legal challenge!

); }; export default ScenarioDetail;
